job_description:
About the job
Senior Data Analyst - Product Analytics
Toronto, ON (Hybrid)

Apply
Save

We are looking for a Senior Data Analyst to partner with Product, Engineering, and GTM teams.

What you'll do
- Own end-to-end analytics for product initiatives
- Build and maintain dashboards for executive reporting
- Translate business questions into analytical frameworks
- Partner with stakeholders across teams

Requirements (must have)
- 5+ years of analytics experience
- Strong SQL skills
- Experience with BI tools (Tableau or Looker)
- Strong communication skills

Preferred / nice to have
- Experience with dbt and Airflow
- Experience in SaaS or B2B product companies
- Python for data analysis

Language
- Professional English required

Visa
- Must be legally authorized to work in Canada

Compensation
- Competitive salary and stock options

Company values
- We move fast and care deeply about customers.
